model.description: Alibaba • A balance between effectiveness, speed, and cost.

pick.rationale: Iowa State holds a narrow edge in this competitive Sweet 16 matchup as the 2-seed, reflecting the selection committee's view of their superior overall profile compared to Virginia's 3-seed status. The Cyclones' Big 12 pedigree and dominant Round of 32 performance over Kentucky demonstrate quality that should translate against Virginia's pack-line defense. While Tony Bennett's tournament experience and Virginia's elite 13th-14th ranked defense present a credible upset path, Iowa State's higher seeding, offensive versatility, and power conference background give them the slight advantage in what should be a closely contested defensive battle.

reasoningStep.title: Iowa State vs Virginia Sweet 16 Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Iowa State edges Virginia in a tight 2 vs 3 seed Sweet 16 matchup based on seeding advantage, Big 12 pedigree, and overall profile quality despite Virginia's elite defense.
reasoningStep.evidence: Virginia ranks 13th-14th nationally with 29-4 record and elite defense (adj_d 95.7), but Iowa State's 2-seed status indicates superior overall quality. Prior picks show Iowa State won R32 with 72% confidence over Kentucky while Virginia won with only 58% confidence over Tennessee. Historical 2-seed vs 3-seed Sweet 16 matchups favor the 2-seed approximately 55-60% of the time. Virginia's offense ranks 28th-31st which could limit scoring against Iowa State's defense, while the Cyclones' Big 12 background provides strength of schedule advantage.

Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.

pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
